title: pterostylis bracteatus
intro: Pterostylis bracteatus, also known as the bracted greenhood, is a species of orchid native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Pterostylis bracteatus include its potential to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory infections, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Pterostylis bracteatus can be prepared for herbal use by drying and processing the plant into teas, tinctures, or infusions.
